content_body: We have been vacationing in the Blue Ridge area for quite some time and know what to typically expect when we arrive at the home. Those expectations were far exceeded when we first walked through the doors. The home is full—full of beautiful furniture, decorations, and appliances. It is full of things to keep you warm, to make you smile, to make you want to slow down and settle in. It needed nothing. The communication was top notch with the management company, Cabin Rentals of Georgia. The gravel/dirt road was a mess due to rain, but this did not affect the property at all. Depending on your vacation plans, do your grocery shopping on the way in, then open the doors, listen to the river, enjoy some wine, and wait for the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway to pass by. You won't want to leave.
title: You Won't Want To Leave
